Metadata.title: BitRouter — Open Intelligence Router for LLM Agents
Metadata.description: Optimize your agent runtime with two lines of code. 10x up performance & 10x down cost.

Hero.headline: Open Intelligence Router for LLM Agents
Hero.subtitle: Optimize your agent runtime with two lines of code. 10x up performance & 10x down cost.
Hero.timelineLabel: See it in action — a 10-call agent session, routed in real time

IntegrationBar.heading: Works with any leading agent runtime

runtimeNative.title: Runtime-Native
runtimeNative.benefit: Built into your stack. Not bolted on.
runtimeNative.description: Integrates directly into your agent runtime as a native SDK — not an external proxy. Two lines of code, zero infrastructure changes.

smartRouting.title: Smart Routing
smartRouting.benefit: Right model for every call. Automatically.
smartRouting.description: Each call is classified by task type and routed to the cheapest model that handles it. Full routing logs and per-call reasoning included.

policyControl.title: Policy Control
policyControl.description: Define spend caps, model allowlists, rate limits, and escalation policies per session or per agent. Policies enforce themselves — no manual oversight needed.

Benchmarks.heading: Proven on real agent workloads
Benchmarks.calloutHeadline: 93.2% resolve rate at 42% of the cost

Setup.heading: One line to start saving
Setup.subtitle: BitRouter is OpenAI-compatible. Swap your base URL. Keep everything else.
